testcase.name: Truth viewer smoke > renders approved truth metadata, provenance, and history
Truth viewer smoke > shows an explicit approved truth unavailable state without fallback data
Truth viewer smoke > renders safely when governance and runtime telemetry are partial
Truth viewer smoke > opens a deep-linked truth version from remediation navigation
Truth viewer smoke > shows a publish receipt after approving a reviewed candidate
Truth viewer smoke > executes governed rollback from truth compare and shows the receipt
